debug.name: MTT debug mode
debug.hint: Enables additional console information for the Merchants, Trades and Transactions module.

deleteItem.title: Delete item
deleteItem.content: Do you really want to delete this item from the merchant?

notifications.onlyItemsCanBeDropped: Only items can be added to the merchant.

items.title: Merchant items
items.subtitle: Items currently stored in this merchant.
items.emptyHelp: Unlock the sheet to create or add items.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Items currently offered or stored by this merchant.
products.dropHelp: Drop items here from the sidebar or a compendium.

empty.title: No products
empty.text: This merchant does not contain any item yet.
empty.help: Unlock the sheet to create or add items.

empty.title: No services
empty.text: This merchant does not offer any services yet.

sessions.submittedNotice: The transaction is waiting for the merchant’s decision.

empty.title: Configuration
empty.text: General merchant options and the transaction log will be grouped here.

itemSubcategoryPath.name: Product subcategory path
itemSubcategoryPath.hint: Path read from the source Item to display a discrete subcategory icon in the catalog. Leave empty to disable this feature.

itemSecretDescriptionPath.name: Secret description path for delivered Items
itemSecretDescriptionPath.hint: Path where MTT writes secret information on delivered items. If identical to the visible description path, secrets are added in a Foundry secret block in the same field. If different, secret information is written to this separate field. If empty, secret information is not copied to the delivered item.

importExport.title: Import / Export
importExport.hint: Import a ready-made MTT configuration for your game system before filling in paths manually, or export your current configuration to share it.
importExport.invalidFile: The selected file is not a valid MTT configuration.
importExport.unsupportedVersion: This MTT configuration file version is not supported.
importExport.importConfirmContent: Importing this configuration will replace the current MTT module settings.
importExport.systemMismatch: Warning: this configuration was exported for system {systemId}. The current system is {currentSystem}.

columns.actorPathHint: Path to read and write this currency on an actor. Example: system.currency.sp
columns.itemPricePathHint: Path to read the amount of this currency on an Item. Example: system.price.value
columns.itemCurrencyPathHint: Path to read the Item currency when the system uses a single value + denomination field. Leave empty if each currency has its own price path. Example: system.price.currency
columns.itemCurrencyValuesHint: Comma-separated aliases used to identify this currency in the Item currency field. Example: pa, PA, sp, SP
